content.en:
In the Void Heavenly Dao Writing Realm, the Heavenly Dao Guardian was standing there, silently guarding.

Ye Tian stepped into the realm of the Heavenly Dao Text of the Void, and the Heavenly Dao Guardian made a move.

It wants to drive Ye Tian away, and even kill Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the Guardian of the Heavenly Dao of the Sky is far stronger than that of the previous Guardian of the Heavenly Dao of Killing Heavenly Dao Text, after all, the power contained in the Empty Heavenly Dao Text can far exceed that of the Killing Heavenly Dao Text.

I saw that the guardian of the Heavenly Dao of the Sky suddenly reached over with one hand, tearing through the space and grabbing Ye Tian.

The space around is completely confined, and ordinary people really can't break free from the shackles.

However, Ye Tian also possessed a god-level spatial talent, so he could offset the spatial confinement of the Heavenly Dao Guardian.

Then.

Ye Tian unleashed one of the spatial supernatural powers, the Ten Thousand Realms!

Whew!!!

A heavy enchantment suppressed the Heavenly Dao Guardian's body, weakening the strength of the Heavenly Dao Guardian, and making it difficult for the Heavenly Dao Guardian to attack Ye Tian.

"Space Statue!"

Ye Tian used another spatial divine power to attack the Heavenly Dao Guardian.

The two spatial supernatural powers, coupled with Ye Tian's powerful physical body, were not weaker than the Heavenly Dao Guardians at all for a while.

In the blink of an eye, the two sides fought for a long time.

......

"Strange, why didn't Ye Yi come out?"

Yama 3 was curious.

According to his estimates, Ye Yi should fail soon.

"Won't be killed?"

Yama thought to himself.

Immediately, its divine sense penetrated into the realm, but its divine sense would be suppressed very strongly, and it was difficult to see the situation inside.

In the Heavenly Dao Writing Realm, if you enter one creature at a time, the second creature will be stopped if you want to break into the realm, unless you break the power of the entire realm.

But even if it was, it couldn't break the power of the entire domain at once, it was tantamount to destroying the Heavenly Dao Text.

Thundered!!!!

At this time, Ye Tianzheng and the Heavenly Dao Guardian were fighting extremely fiercely, and Yama San vaguely sensed the battle scene, and was immediately stunned: "Amazing, Ye Yi's parents should be very amazing, they are definitely the strongest in the void, otherwise there is no way to give birth to such a powerful heir!"

At this moment, a thought suddenly occurred to him.

Maybe Ye Tian was really able to defeat the Heavenly Dao Guardian and win the Heavenly Dao Text of the Sky.

field.

The Heavenly Dao Guardian has many means, using the power of space to the extent that he can do whatever he wants, and can even turn the power of space into guns, knives, shields and other weapons, showing even more terrifying attack power.

Compared to the methods of the Heavenly Dao Guardians, Ye Tian's methods were a little immature, but they were many times more clever than other spatial talents.

Ye Tian had the Chaos Ancient Realm as a support, and his strength would hardly be exhausted, so he didn't worry about the problem of combat endurance at all.

Time passed like this, at the beginning, Ye Tian just wanted to simply defeat the Heavenly Dao Guardian, but later he had a thought, that is, to join forces with the Heavenly Dao Guardian, use the spatial means of this Heavenly Dao Guardian to hone his spatial means, and even absorb the spatial essence of the other party's body to increase his control over the spatial power.

In the process of fighting, it is very difficult to temper himself, but Ye Tian has a super comprehension and comprehension talent, and his understanding of spatial power is not shallow, so there is definitely hope to improve the control of spatial power to a higher level.

In this way, Ye Tian fought with the Heavenly Dao Guardian for half a month.

this day.

Ye Tian violently manipulated the power of the laws of space and turned into a knife.

"Slash!"

The Spatial Law Knife tore through the domain space and bombarded the body of the Heavenly Dao Guardian, shaking the Heavenly Dao Guardian back at once.

Of course, it was impossible to defeat the Heavenly Dao Guardian just like this, after all, the Heavenly Dao Guardian's achievements in spatial attainment were not comparable to Ye Tian.

So, Ye Tian continued to temper himself and manipulate the power of space.

Gradually, Ye Tian's control of spatial power became more and more skillful, and he even gradually approached the guardian of the Heavenly Dao.

With the improvement of the control of space power, Ye Tian gradually had a different understanding of spatial supernatural powers.

"The magic power of the Ten Thousand Realms is indeed very powerful, it can create ten thousand heavy enchantments, but when it is used to deal with real powerhouses, ten thousand heavy enchantments are no different from paper paste, and the quantity cannot improve the quality. If you can fuse 10,000 heavy enchantments into a single enchantment, then the power of this double enchantment is far greater than that of 10,000 heavy realms. Before, the reason why I couldn't fuse the Ten Thousand Realms was because I didn't have a strong control over the power of space, and I couldn't evolve my supernatural powers at all. "

Ye Tian thought.

The evolution of supernatural powers is a disguised ascension after the consummation of supernatural powers.

Ye Tian has always understood this truth, but it is difficult to do.

For example, the fire dragon supernatural power is a very common supernatural power in the fire system, once released, it is to form a fire dragon, but if it can be evolved, then the fire dragon will be transformed into a variety of forms, and the power is even more terrifying.

The same goes for space supernatural powers!

The evolution of supernatural powers is also an inevitable step in the development of supernatural powers to the end.

Many great powers cannot be cultivated into great supernatural powers, and can only progress in the direction of supernatural evolution, thereby increasing the power of supernatural powers.

And now, Ye Tian has also come to this point.

As the days passed, the enchantments formed by Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Realms became less and less.

From 10,000 to 9,000 enchantments, to 8,000 enchantments, and then the enchantments decreased faster and faster.

Kuju!

Yae!

Sevenfold!

Sixfold!

Fivefold!

......

this day.

Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Realms have become a Heavy Realm, which seems to be a regression, but in fact it is a great progress.

Rumble!!!

The attack of the Heavenly Dao Guardian came again, Ye Tian waved his hand, and the One Heavy Realm formed by the fusion of the Ten Thousand Realms easily blocked the attack of the Heavenly Dao Guardians.

"It can't be called a one-fold realm, it should be called a one-fold supernatural power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

With the Ten Thousand Returns to One Divine Power, it was almost difficult for the Heavenly Dao Guardian to hurt Ye Tian, and the suppression effect of the Ten Thousand Returns to One Divine Power was far beyond the Ten Thousand Realms of the Consummation Realm, weakening the strength of the Heavenly Dao Guardian even more ruthlessly.

As a result, Ye Tian's strength began to suppress the Heavenly Dao Guardian.

In the midst of the battles again and again, the Heavenly Dao Guardian began to weaken, and was finally accepted by Ye Tian into the Void Mina Realm in the palm of the Void Mi, and then crushed it into nothingness.

After killing the Heavenly Dao Guardian, Ye Tian easily took the Empty Heavenly Dao text and put it into his soul.

Wow!

Ye Tian flew out of the castle.

"Ye Yi, you are amazing. Unexpectedly, you only reached the god level, and actually took away the Empty Heaven Dao text, if it was transmitted back to the clan, the other clansmen would definitely be extremely shocked. I think that at the god-level level, your strength is definitely the first!" Yamasan praised.

"It's just a fluke!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

Obtaining the Empty Heaven Dao text, Ye Tian's purpose was completed, he originally wanted to leave here, but the next words from Yamasan made him change his mind.

"Ye Yi, although your cultivation is weak, but the combat power of the same level is very strong, I know a treasure land, are you interested in going with me? There is a danger on the periphery, I will help you deal with it, but there is a place in the core area, I can't go in, you can go in." I think with your strength, you should be able to get in. I only need one thing there, and the others are yours. "

Yama-san proposed.

"Yama San, what kind of place is it, will there be any danger?" Ye Tian asked.

"It's not much of a danger. "

Yamasan hurriedly informed Ye Tian of the basic situation of that place.

It turns out that the place that Yamasan is talking about is another Void Zone, but that area is a little different, because a strange race was born there, called the Void Demon Race.

The Void Demon Clan is a real Void Realm creature, controlling the power of the Heavenly Dao, and is almost immortal in the Void Realm, although the strength is not very strong, but because it is almost impossible to die, it is a very troublesome race.

Of course.

The Void Demon Clan is territorial consciousness and hardly leaves the territory.

And the Void Demon Clan still holds the Heavenly Dao Tree, which is the treasure of the Void Demon Clan, and the Heavenly Dao Leaf is a leaf plucked from the Heavenly Dao Tree, and a Heavenly Dao Tree has about a thousand leaves.

But for Yama San, neither the Heavenly Dao Tree nor the Heavenly Dao Leaf mattered, after all, this thing could not improve its strength, and the Xukun clan did not have any rich values.

Unless it's something that works for you, you don't value anything else.

Like the Heavenly Dao text of the Void, it is important to every Xukun, so it is extremely precious, and among the Xukun clan, the Xukun who is not weak basically has Heavenly Dao leaves. Heavenly Dao Leaves didn't have much value to the Xukun Clan, so they naturally wouldn't collect Heavenly Dao Leaves on a large scale.

What Yamasan really cares about is the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart that was nurtured by the Heavenly Dao Space inside the Heavenly Dao Tree!

The Heavenly Dao Wood Heart is a strange treasure that can enhance the bloodline talent.

Although Yamasan's bloodline talent has reached the Yu level, it wants to be promoted above the Yu level, and there is almost nothing in the universe that can raise the Yu level cultivation talent to another level, but Tiandao Mu Xin can do it.

But Yamasan himself could not enter the Heavenly Dao Space, because the Heavenly Dao Space could only allow creatures with weak cultivation to enter, and once he entered the Heavenly Dao Space, his cultivation would be completely suppressed, and even the degree of suppression was even more terrifying than the realm of the Heavenly Dao Writings of the Void.

Therefore, Yamasan himself did not dare to enter the Heavenly Dao Space, otherwise he might really fall into the Heavenly Dao Space.

"Ye Yi, although I don't know what level your bloodline talent is, I can guarantee that once I obtain the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart, I only need half of it. You must know that this territory of the Void Demon Clan was discovered by me by chance, and the other Void Kun didn't know. In addition, without me helping you deal with those void demons, you would not be able to break into the Heavenly Dao Tree. Would you like to go, and if you do, let's go now. If not, then let's separate now!" asked Yamasan.

Ye Tian pondered for a while, and finally nodded: "Okay, I'm willing!"

It was actually very curious about the Void Demon Clan, the Heavenly Dao Tree, and the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart, and wanted to capture some Heavenly Dao Leaves.

For the Xukun clan, the Heavenly Dao Leaf is nothing, but for the Terran, the Heavenly Dao Leaf is extremely precious, which means that the strong people of the Terran can stay in the Void Realm in the future.

Maybe in the future, the Terrans can build a base in the Void!
